channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fpur bixes and bags of clitges hoysehold and paperwirk with adresses and names dumped in the top of our recycling bins, 19th March
item.description:
Happened today..time n/k. Envelopes and papers gave names and addesses on from SW16 and giosy Hill. Has happened a couple of previous times recently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tylney Avenue, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on pavement, 19th March
item.description:
This hole has been here for several months and is a real trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveway, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 36 (smart dry cleaner ) All this patio including the steps, 19th March
item.description:
The pavement is fault and has been leaking into underground basement area for months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Mill Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Roche Bobois car park near to first house on the left, 19th March
item.description:
This tree isn’t on the tree map marked for removal or unhealthy but was totally cut down and left as a stump (upload photo feature not working) why was this healthy tree removed and why did noisy work start at 8am
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alvanley Gardens, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On south side in between Maresfield & Fitzjohns, 19th March
item.description:
Blocked at the top
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nutley Terrace, Belsize Park, Greater London

item.title: Local resident dumping, 19th March
item.description:
A local resident has dumped their boxes And inside doors in the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Andrews Mews, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti added to Music Box building, 19th March
item.description:
As can be seen from the attached picture. Note that there is also graffiti on the brick wall next to the building.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Southwark Street, Southwark, Greater London

item.title: Litter everywhere, 19th March
item.description:
Side of road covered in litter. This is not cleaned every week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th March
item.description:
Lady coming out of 44a just fly tipped household rubbish over the road in broad daylight and with people watching

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese Knotweed in Alex Rec, 19th March
item.description:
Notifiable invasive species!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on corner, chair and fabrics, 19th March
item.description:
I was do walking and watched a man dump some rubbish on the corner of the road. He loaded it out of his car, and elderly couple live at the house and constantly have rubbish dumped outside. I have the mans license plate it is LV67WXW.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old black bag and timber, 19th March
item.description:
Barham scum dumping rubbish again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37 - 59, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Bumb damage, 19th March
item.description:
This speed bump keeps deteriorating despite repeated repairs. It clearly needs a proper, long-term fix

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London

item.title: Massive broken slabs, 19th March
item.description:
Trip hazards see picture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tuam Road, Plumstead

item.title: Walking sticks child’s bike, 19th March
item.description:
Walking sticks child’s bike on Albatross Way bike rack.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint dust - microplastics and heavy metals, 19th March
item.description:
Paint dust from council work on yellow lines left on both sides on road on pavement and in gutter. Paint dust contains microplastics and heavy metals that will enter watersupply if not appropriately disposed of. It also looks unsightly. My children will be breathing it in on the way to school. Why has it been left? I was told appropriate action had been taken and that my last request was resolved but no action has been taken. The Paint dust remains.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked, 19th March
item.description:
It is at critical failure point of a steep gradient on Ascot Road. Due to the hill, significant volumes of water are rushing down and bypassing this blocked drain, completely flooring further down. It is 100% full of silt and requires attention immediately to prevent damage to homes down the incline. This is a recurring safety hazard that surface cleaning will not resolve.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ascot Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on drain cover in middle of road, 19th March
item.description:
You fixed 1, and said you fixed both, but this has not been fixed and is dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Wisley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 19th March
item.description:
Kitchen units flytipped on green area outside 265 Chipperfield Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase dumped in flowerbed, 19th March
item.description:
Someone's left a large brown suitcase in the shrubbery near the railway bridge on Green Lane (Provincial Terrace side)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
